lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Diamondback Explorer ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Diamondback Explorer
sources.what: Ship overview: stats, internals layout, hardpoints, price, and shipyard availability.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki
sources.what: Diamondback Explorer lore, manufacturer, jump-range/heat profile, and design notes.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Opinionated review of the Diamondback Explorer as a budget deep-space explorer, weighed against newer hulls like the Mandalay.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Review of the pre-built Diamondback Explorer for exploration: jump range, heat efficiency, budget value, and engineering to improve it.
